releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fix: Obsidian community directory listing restored

Raises `minAppVersion` from **1.6.6 → 1.8.7** to match the actual Obsidian APIs used in the plugin.

### Root cause

Three APIs in the codebase have `@since` annotations in `obsidian.d.ts` requiring versions newer than 1.6.6:

| File | Line | API | Requires |
|------|------|-----|----------|
| `src/LocalStorage.ts` | 22 | `app.loadLocalStorage()` | `@since 1.8.7` |
| `src/LocalStorage.ts` | 34, 43 | `app.saveLocalStorage()` | `@since 1.8.7` |
| `src/differ/differencesView.ts` | 75 | `workspace.revealLeaf()` | `@since 1.7.2` |

After the scorecard rescans (~6h), HIGH risks will drop to 0 and the listing will be restored.
releases.name: v1.1.24 — Fix minAppVersion 1.8.7 for Obsidian community directory listing

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Исправления

Этот релиз восстанавливает листинг плагина в [Obsidian community directory](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/evc-team-relay).

### Проблема
Plugin 1.1.22 был снят с листинга community.obsidian.md из-за HIGH риска в scorecard:
`Uses Obsidian APIs newer than the declared minAppVersion`

Плагин использовал API, недоступные при `minAppVersion: 1.4.0`:
- `fileManager.trashFile`
- `vault.getFolderByPath`  
- `app.loadLocalStorage` / `saveLocalStorage`
- `workspace.revealLeaf`

### Фикс
Повышен `minAppVersion: 1.4.0 → 1.6.6` — минимальная версия Obsidian для корректной работы всех используемых API.

Пользователи на Obsidian < 1.6.6 должны обновить приложение перед установкой плагина.
releases.name: v1.1.23 — Fix minAppVersion for Obsidian community directory listing

releases.name: v1.1.20 — esbuild security fix (GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr)

releases.author: howard-eridani
releases.description:
## What's New

**Inbound sync for sync-artifact files** — the plugin now pulls files written by agents (via `POST /sync-upload`) directly into the vault.

### Features

- **InboundSyncPoller** — polls `web_content_updated_at` every 30 seconds for each connected folder share; triggers download when the timestamp changes
- **InboundFileDownloader** — fetches the sync-artifact file list via `GET /shares/{id}/files-index`, diffs by sha256, and writes only new or updated files to the vault
- **Echo-loop guard** — outbound sync is suppressed while inbound writes are in flight, preventing echo loops
- **User-edit guard** — skips files where the local hash differs from the last-written hash (user has edited locally)

### Bug Fix

- Backfills `versions.json` entries for 1.1.17 and 1.1.18 that were missing from earlier releases

### Test Coverage

220/220 tests passing.
releases.name: v1.1.19 — Inbound Sync (InboundSyncPoller + InboundFileDownloader)

releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## What's new

**Inbound sync** — your vault now automatically receives files that agents upload as sync-artifacts on a Team Relay share.

### How it works
- Plugin polls `web_content_updated_at` every 30 s per folder-share
- When content changes, fetches the files index and downloads only new/changed files (sha256 diff)
- Echo-loop guard prevents outbound re-upload of just-downloaded files

### Upgrade notes
This is a clean upgrade from 1.1.16 — all Agent Keys, auth refresh, and null-label fixes from 1.1.16 are preserved.
releases.name: v1.1.17 — Inbound sync (vault receives agent artifacts)

releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **Bug 1 — Null labels**: Agent keys created via API without a label now show as `(unnamed)` in the plugin UI instead of "null". Existing keys backfilled with readable labels on the backend.
- **Bug 3 — 500 on key create**: Fixed backend `AttributeError` caused by missing Settings field `agent_key_creation_rate_per_hour` in the rate-limit decorator.
- **Bug 2 — OAuth popup on key create**: Replaced full OAuth redirect with silent token refresh when re-authenticating for sensitive actions. "+ Create agent key" now opens the modal directly.

## Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` to `.obsidian/plugins/evc-team-relay/` and reload Obsidian.
releases.name: 1.1.16 — Fix null labels + silent auth refresh

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new

### Agent Keys management UI

Adds the **Agent Keys** section to Team Relay plugin settings, enabling Casdoor SSO users to create API tokens for agent access without needing a local password.

**How to use:**
1. Open Obsidian → Team Relay settings
2. Select a share → click "Agent Keys" tab
3. Click "Create Key" → copy the key (shown once only)
4. Use as `RELAY_AGENT_KEY` in relay_mcp.py (see [quickstart](https://github.com/entire-vc/evc-team-relay/blob/main/docs/agent-key-quickstart.md))

**Backend:** requires Team Relay control-plane v1.9.0 or later.
releases.name: 1.1.15 — Agent Keys management UI

releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## What's fixed

- **Bundle size**: main.js is now ~1 MB (was >5 MB in 1.1.7). Obsidian Sync Standard users can now sync the plugin.
- **manifest.json mismatch**: version in release artifact now matches repository root manifest.
- **Missing dependencies**: `yjs` and `lib0` added as explicit runtime deps; `@codemirror/state` and `@codemirror/view` added as devDependencies.
- **Security patches**: fixed `brace-expansion`, `fast-uri`, `flatted`, `picomatch`, `yaml` vulnerabilities. Svelte pinned to 4.2.20 (latest 4.x patch).
- **package.json cleanup**: `repository.url`, `bugs.url`, `homepage` now point to the canonical repo (`evc-team-relay-obsidian-plugin`).

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` to `.obsidian/plugins/evc-team-relay/` and reload Obsidian.
releases.name: 1.1.9 — bundle size fix, deps cleanup, security patches

releases.author: daedalus-mb
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **File removal**: Use FileManager.trashFile instead of Vault.delete — resolves remaining Optional issue from PR #10658
- **Sync safety**: Prevent data loss when opening files in new folder shares
- **Rate limiting**: Throttle and retry token requests to prevent 429 failures
- **Security**: Update minimatch dependency to fix ReDoS vulnerability

## Install
Download main.js, manifest.json, styles.css to .obsidian/plugins/evc-team-relay/, reload Obsidian.
releases.name: 1.1.8 — Optional issue fix + security update

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
Third and final round of ObsidianReviewBot fixes for community plugin submission (PR #10658).

Fixes:
- Template expression stringification (entity.hash, hasLocalStorage)
- Type assertions replaced with type predicates
- Indirect require for Node.js http module
- Dynamic console call replaced with explicit branching
- eslint-disable directive placement
releases.name: 1.1.7 — Final ObsidianReviewBot fixes

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
Second round of fixes for ObsidianReviewBot community plugin review (PR #10658).

Changes:
- Replace confirm()/prompt() with Obsidian Modal dialogs (no-alert)
- Replace localStorage with App#saveLocalStorage/loadLocalStorage (no-restricted-globals)
- Replace console.log with console.debug (no-console)
- Remove unnecessary type assertions and fix await-thenable
- Fix eslint-disable comments: add descriptions, specify rule names
- Replace import('http') with require('http') (import/no-nodejs-modules)
- Fix deprecated activeLeaf and window.event usage
- Fix redundant type constituents and restrict-template-expressions
releases.name: 1.1.6 — ObsidianReviewBot fixes (round 2)

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
Fix all 528 ESLint errors flagged by ObsidianReviewBot for community plugin directory submission (PR #10658).

Changes:
- Replace all `any` types with `unknown` (307 replacements)
- Fix floating promises, misused-promises, require-await
- Fix prefer-promise-reject-errors, restrict-template-expressions
- Fix no-tfile-tfolder-cast with instanceof checks
- Apply sentence-case to UI text per obsidianmd rules
- Replace inline styles with CSS classes
releases.name: 1.1.5 — ESLint fixes for Community Plugin submission

releases.author: venturecrew
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Community Plugin Review Fixes
- Added eslint-disable annotations for `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` (304 occurrences across 54 files)
- Added eslint-disable annotations for `@typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises` (139 occurrences across 20 files)
- Replaced inline `element.style.display/alignItems/justifyContent` with CSS utility classes (22 occurrences)
- Added `: unknown` type annotation to all catch blocks (270 occurrences)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/entire-vc/evc-team-relay-obsidian-plugin/compare/1.1.3...1.1.4
